name: Folletti
short_description: Step into a twisted world of danger and adventure in this dark Action-RPG. Battle your way through bizarre landscapes teeming with sinister foes. Unearth lethal weapons and tackle mind-bending quests that will test your limits. Stay vigilant—you're not the only one prowling these eerie lands.
detailed_description:
Experience dark humor and an open-world RPG like never before. In Folletti, step into the shoes of Yezac Folletti, who awakens to the horror of his wife being kidnapped by the sinister Degenite Church in the eerie land of Krycek. Embark on a quest across this bizarre realm, uncovering clues, forging alliances with quirky friends and peculiar creatures, and taking on odd quests. Unearth hidden conspiracies, brave terrifying territories, and perhaps find camaraderie in unexpected places.

Gameplay

  • Craft Weapons and Health Kits: Prepare for battle with custom creations.

  • Exciting Button-Smashing Melee: Engage in thrilling combat.

  • Solve Bizarre Quests: Navigate strange and unique challenges.

  • Graded Endings: Your actions shape your final outcome.

  • Dark Humor & Horror Twist: Enjoy a blend of creepiness and comedy.

  • Creepy/Funny Cutscenes: Delight in humorous and unsettling animations.

  • Game Performance Grading: Receive a grade based on your in-game performance.

  • Loveable and Psychopathic Characters: Meet a diverse cast with intriguing personalities.

  • Deep and Rich Story: Immerse yourself in a narrative full of twists and surprises.

Venture into the land of Krycek and experience a game where every choice matters and every encounter is unforgettable.
